failures.description: The agent planned and executed ProductCatalogSearch with available_only=false even though the task asked for the cheapest available item. This violated the required availability filter, even though the final answer happened to select an available item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to find the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The agent's end goal matched that goal, but at the first planning step it chose to include unavailable products by setting available_only=false. The required constraint, availability, was already present in the user request, so the agent had enough information to restrict the search to available items. This is a plan/tool-argument deviation, not an invented fact or tool-output misread.
